# A Plus Shoe Repair & Alterations

> Family-owned shoe repair and alterations shop at Springfield Mall in Springfield, Virginia. Forty years of hand-craft experience — first at Cherry Hill Mall in New Jersey since 1986, now serving Northern Virginia from Springfield Mall.

## About

A Plus Shoe Repair & Alterations is a third-generation cobbler and tailor specializing in women's high-heel repair and Christian Louboutin red-sole restoration. The same Landis stitchers and Sutton finishers used since 1986 in Cherry Hill, New Jersey now serve customers in Northern Virginia at Springfield Mall, Suite 13006.

## Services

### Shoe repair
- Women's high-heel top-lifts and heel tips (most pairs in 15 minutes)
- Stiletto reheeling — pumps, kitten heels, block heels
- Christian Louboutin red-sole restoration with factory-matched lacquer
- Full and half resoling in rubber or leather
- Boot heel rebuilds, lifts, and taps
- Leather repair, recoloring, conditioning, and dye color matching
- Custom shoe stretching for width or length
- Orthopedic adjustments

### Leather goods
- Handbag and purse handle replacement
- Strap replacement and lining repair
- Zipper repair and replacement
- Leather jacket restoration
- Luggage repair

### Alterations (new at the Springfield location)
- Hems for pants, skirts, and dresses
- Waist and sleeve adjustments
- Suit and tuxedo alterations
- Wedding and occasion dress fittings
- Zipper replacement on garments

### Additional services
- Key cutting (while you wait)
- Hand shoe shines
- Shoelace and sock liner replacement
- Mold, mildew, and odor removal
- Waterproofing

## Location

**Address:** 6660 Springfield Mall, Suite 13006, Springfield, Virginia 22150
**Phone:** (703) 217-1162
**Inside:** Springfield Town Center mall, near Nordstrom Rack

## Hours

- Monday through Saturday: 10:00 AM – 9:00 PM
- Sunday: 11:00 AM – 6:00 PM

## Service area

Springfield, Alexandria, Arlington, Fairfax County, Fairfax City, Annandale, Burke, Springfield Forest, Lake Ridge — and the broader Northern Virginia / Washington, DC metro.

## History

Founded in 1986 at Cherry Hill Mall in Cherry Hill, New Jersey. Operated continuously at that location for nearly four decades before relocating to Springfield Mall, Virginia. The same equipment, family ownership, and craft standards moved with the shop — the bench is unchanged.

## Pricing

Mid-range ($$). Most heel-tip and top-lift jobs are completed in 15 minutes for under $25. Full resoling and complex restoration ranges $50–$150 depending on materials. Alterations priced per garment.

## What makes A Plus different

- Forty years at the same bench, by the same family
- Specialization in women's designer footwear (Louboutin, Manolo Blahnik, Jimmy Choo)
- Original Landis stitchers and Sutton finishers from 1986 — same machines, same techniques
- Honest assessment: "If we can't fix it, we'll tell you honestly."
- Walk-ins welcome; most quick repairs done while customers shop the mall

## Frequently asked

**How long does shoe repair take?** Most heel tips and top-lifts are done in 15 minutes. Full resoling, alterations, and complex restoration take 3–5 business days.

**Do you restore Christian Louboutin red soles?** Yes. We use factory-matched red lacquer, hand-buffed and sealed.

**Do I need an appointment?** No. Walk-ins are welcome during all open hours.

**What payment methods do you accept?** Cash and all major credit cards.

**Do you ship shoes back to customers?** Local pickup only at the Springfield Mall location.
